arts.ttl: Man Utd Backed in Pursuing £63M-Rated PSG Transfer Target Who Has ‘Big Character’
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain has been linked with Victor Osimhen over the past two transfer windows, and with the summer window approaching, rumors are intensifying. Currently at Galatasaray, Osimhen has rediscovered the form that made him one of the standout players of the 2022-23 season, drawing interest from top clubs across Europe. arts.ttl: Barcelona Willing to Accept at Least €65M This Summer for Liverpool, PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona is up in the air as he enters the final year of his contract. With several European clubs interested, one Premier League team has reportedly made him a priority target. arts.ttl: Man Utd Unlikely to Move as Liverpool Make Contact for PSG-Linked Forward Goal-Scorer
arts.sum: With Randal Kolo Muani now at Juventus, Paris Saint-Germain are looking to offload the French striker permanently, either to the Turin club or another interested team. That could put the Ligue 1 side in the market for a new No. 9 this summer. arts.ttl: Man Utd’s PSR Issue Block Blockbuster Move for €80M-Rated Man City Target With PSG Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain initially took a short-term approach by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. Still, with his future more settled after the German club made the move permanent, the question is where he will go long-term as the summer months approach. arts.ttl: PSG to Incorporate Jordan Logo Into Crest?
arts.sum: According to our reliable source, PSG intends to incorporate the Jordan logo into the PSG crest for the fourth 25-26 collection.

arts.ttl: Achraf Hakimi and Lee Kang-in to miss PSG’s visit to Saint-Étienne

arts.ttl: Man City could use 'Claudio Echeverri card' to beat Real Madrid, PSG to £41.6m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City could use teenage midfield talent Claudio Echeverri as a bargaining chip in their pursuit of Lazio defender Mario Gila, according to a report.
